title: trifolium polyodon
intro: Trifolium polyodon, also known as the cluster clover, is a perennial legume native to Australia and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation due to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Trifolium polyodon include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome and other gastrointestinal disorders. Herbal preparations of Trifolium polyodon, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to treat digestive issues and can be found in some herbal remedies and supplements.
